title: Powder bed containment systems for use with rotating direct metal laser melting systems
abstract: A powder bed containment system for use with a rotating direct metal laser melting (DMLM) system includes an annular build plate, which includes an inner wall, an outer wall concentric with the inner wall and spaced radially apart from the inner wall, and a substantially planar build surface extending between the inner wall and the outer wall, where the substantially planar build surface is arranged to receive a weldable powder for manufacture of an object. The powder bed containment system also includes an outer containment wall radially outward of the outer wall of the annular build plate, an inner containment wall radially inward of the inner wall of the annular build plate, and at least one actuator mechanically coupled to at least one of i) the outer containment wall and ii) the inner containment wall, where the at least one actuator is configured to raise at least one of i) the outer containment wall and ii) the inner containment wall axially relative to the substantially planar build surface during manufacture of the object.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A powder bed containment system for use with a rotating direct metal laser melting (DMLM) system, said powder bed containment system comprising: an annular build plate comprising: an inner wall; an outer wall concentric with said inner wall and spaced radially apart from said inner wall; and a substantially planar build surface extending between said inner wall and said outer wall, said substantially planar build surface arranged to receive a weldable powder for manufacture of an object; an outer containment wall radially outward of said outer wall of said annular build plate; an inner containment wall radially inward of said inner wall of said annular build plate; and at least one actuator mechanically coupled to at least one of i) said outer containment wall and ii) said inner containment wall, said at least one actuator configured to raise at least one of i) said outer containment wall and ii) said inner containment wall axially relative to said substantially planar build surface during manufacture of the object. 2. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, wherein said at least one actuator is spaced radially outward of and mechanically coupled to said outer containment wall. 3. The powder bed containment system of Claim 2, further comprising a first plurality of actuators spaced radially outward of and mechanically coupled to said outer containment wall. 4. The powder bed containment system of Claim 3, further 

 comprising a second plurality of actuators spaced radially inward of and mechanically coupled to said inner containment wall. 5. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, wherein said at least one actuator is arranged to be fixedly mounted on a support surface separate from said build plate. 6. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, further comprising a sealing ring disposed between said outer wall of said build plate and said outer containment wall. 7. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, further comprising a sealing ring disposed between said inner wall of said build plate and said inner containment wall. 8. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, further comprising a plurality of actuators spaced concentrically about and mechanically coupled to said outer containment wall, wherein said plurality of actuators are configured to raise said outer containment wall axially relative to said substantially planar build surface. 9. The powder bed containment system of Claim 1, wherein said outer containment wall is mechanically coupled to said inner containment wall, such that said inner containment wall is arranged to translate axially relative to said substantially planar build surface in conjunction with said outer containment wall. 10. The powder bed containment system of Claim 8, wherein each actuator of said plurality of actuators includes a bearing transfer assembly disposed between a rim of said outer containment wall and each actuator of said plurality of actuators. 11. A powder bed containment system for use with a rotating direct metal laser melting (DMLM) system, said powder bed containment system comprising: an annular build plate arranged to receive a weldable powder; 

 a system of containment walls surrounding said annular build plate; and at least one actuator mechanically coupled to said system of containment walls, said at least one actuator configured to raise said system of containment walls axially relative to said annular build plate during manufacture of an object from the weldable powder. 12. The powder bed containment system of Claim 11, wherein said at least one actuator is spaced radially outward of said system of containment walls. 13. The powder bed containment system of Claim 11, wherein said at least one actuator is arranged to be fixedly mounted on a support surface separate from said annular build plate. 14. The powder bed containment system of Claim 11, wherein said system of containment walls comprises an outer containment wall and an inner containment wall, said outer containment wall concentric with said inner containment wall and separated from said inner containment wall by a width, said annular build plate disposed between said outer containment wall and said inner containment wall. 15. The powder bed containment system of Claim 14, further comprising a first plurality of actuators spaced radially outward of and mechanically coupled to said outer containment wall. 16. The powder bed containment system of Claim 15, further comprising a second plurality of actuators spaced radially inward of and mechanically coupled to said inner containment wall. 17. The powder bed containment system of Claim 14, further comprising a plurality of actuators spaced concentrically about and mechanically coupled to said outer containment wall, wherein said plurality of actuators are configured to raise said outer containment wall axially relative to said substantially planar build surface. 18. The powder bed containment system of Claim 17, wherein said outer containment wall is mechanically coupled to said inner containment wall, such that 

 said inner containment wall is arranged to translate axially relative to said annular build plate in conjunction with said outer containment wall. 19. The powder bed containment system of Claim 17, wherein each actuator of said plurality of actuators includes a ball bearing transfer assembly disposed between a rim of said outer containment wall and each actuator of said plurality of actuators. 20. A method of containing a powder bed on an annular build plate in a rotating direct metal laser melting (DMLM) system, said method comprising: receiving a first layer of weldable powder on an annular build surface of the annular build plate, the first layer of weldable powder selectively welded on the annular build surface by a laser scanner; raising an inner containment wall disposed about an outer wall of the annular build plate by an incremental distance; raising an inner containment wall disposed about an inner wall of the annular build plate by the incremental distance; and receiving a second layer of weldable powder on the annular build surface of the annular build plate.
